Lead.title: Lead
Lead.description: A payment solution lead from the landing page contact or consultation booking forms.

businessSize.description: Selected business size or employee count

appointmentDate.description: Scheduled date for the consultation call

appointmentTime.description: Scheduled time slot for the call

source.description: The specific form used (get_in_touch_form or consultation_booking)

marketingConsent.description: Whether the merchant opted into marketing updates

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the lead was generated
